nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: welcome

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: ill skip the pleasantries if youre here you already know how we operate

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: ill be briefing you for this op

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: first what youre looking at right now is the comms terminal

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: messages from me or the target will show up here

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: you reply by entering the matching directional key sequence

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: replies have a time limit

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: miss the window and the target gets suspicious the whole facility goes on higher alert

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: so dont get so focused on moving that you forget to reply

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: speaking of alert thats the most important thing to watch

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: think of it as how aware the entire facility is of your presence

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: the higher it gets the more dangerous things become and reply windows shrink

replies.text: what happens if it maxes out

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: if alert maxes out enemies go into kill mode

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: youll have about half a minute to react

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: after that the mission is a total loss

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: so no matter what do not let alert max out

replies.text: half a minute is not a lot

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: right movement

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: i wont teach you to walk you know the basics

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: you can sprint faster than any enemy but it makes a lot of noise

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: use it to escape in emergencies but dont sprint carelessly

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: exactly about being spotted enemies find you two ways

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: eyes and ears

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: stay in their line of sight too long or make too much noise and they will notice you

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: good news is walls block their vision and their hearing range is limited

replies.text: how do i lower my chances of being spotted

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: crouch

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: crouch walking is much quieter and makes you harder to see

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: crouch and stay still and youre almost invisible

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: bit slower yeah but theres something even better

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: disguise mode

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: activate it and stand still youre completely invisible enemies cant see you

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: but moving while disguised is very slow and not fully invisible

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: best use is to freeze in place when enemies get close

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: you need to be standing still before you can activate it

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: while disguised you cant crouch or sprint

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: press it again to drop the disguise instantly

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: now about how enemies behave

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: normally they patrol no threat to you

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: if they sense something suspicious theyll start searching the area

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: once they confirm your position they come straight for you

replies.text: what happens if they catch me

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: get caught and the mission is over

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: and when one enemy starts chasing you nearby ones get alerted too

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: it cascades and the whole facility goes on high alert fast

replies.text: what if i do get spotted

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: if you have no choice you can take enemies out up close

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: but only works when they havent fully spotted you yet

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: enemies already chasing you are too alert to ambush

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: and every takedown hurts your final rating

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: when going for a takedown scroll wheel to switch between targets

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: the one youve selected will be highlighted

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: careful youre locked in place during the takedown so make sure its clear first

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: aside from takedowns you also have tools

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: theres a decoy that lures patrolling enemies away

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: a radar that shows all enemy positions

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: and one that temporarily freezes a nearby enemy

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: theres also two weapon types but those hit your score even harder

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: every tool use costs you points weapons cost even more

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: tools are found on the map but if you can avoid using them do

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: about scoring you start with a full score every mistake deducts from it

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: kills cost some tools cost some triggering the countdown costs a lot

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: if your score drops too low you fail even if you reach the exit

replies.text: how do i get the best rating

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: highest rating means staying close to a perfect score

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: basically zero kills zero tools zero mistakes

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: the organisation expects nothing less

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: lastly about your objective

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: some doors are locked you need to find key cards

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: walk close to pick them up and all matching doors unlock

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: locations change every time find them yourself

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: each map has an exit walk into it to complete the map

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: one operation has three maps and your score carries across all of them

replies.text: gotta stay sharp across all three

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: one more important thing

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: during real ops youll be chatting with the target under a fake identity

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: the goal is to distract them and extract useful info

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: every reply you choose affects the alert level

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: say the right thing and alert drops say the wrong thing and it rises

replies.text: chat and infiltrate at the same time

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: as alert changes the tone of the conversation shifts

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: low alert means relaxed chat and plenty of time to reply

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: higher alert and they get more tense and you get less time

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: if the target starts doubting who you are the whole conversation changes

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: when suspected stay calm and say less

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: when exposed its all about speed finish the job and get out

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: alright thats the briefing

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: go complete the training course ill be on comms

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: hows your progress

replies.text: been too busy chatting to you havent moved

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: need help

replies.text: no i know what to do

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: as expected

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: well done

nodes.speaker: HANDLER
nodes.message: take your time

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: mate wheres my food

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: its been 5 min past the delivery window already

replies.text: sorry just got to your address
system says its been delivered tho?
sorry got stuck in the lift

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: so where are you then why arent you up here

replies.text: can you tell me how to get there
first time in this area im completely lost

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: everyone else manages to get in here but you cant?

replies.text: im new to this job pls help me out
this building layout is mental innit

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: what do you mean

replies.text: the cook and the owner got into a fight
something happened on the driver side

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: so what about my food

replies.text: im remaking it for you any food allergies
its gone im sorting something out

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: youre COOKING it???

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: nah im easy with everything extra cheese if you can

replies.text: dont worry ill send it over as soon as its done

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: ok fine ill mark it as on-time delivery for you

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: btw what were those two fighting about

replies.text: owner wanted to cut the cooks pay
not sure anyway how do i get to your place

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: how come

nodes.speaker: YOU
nodes.message: owner reckons the cook just microwaves stuff and boils the kettle all day doesnt do any proper cooking

nodes.speaker: YOU
nodes.message: cook says owner wont pay for fresh ingredients and only stocks frozen ready meals

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: hold on

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: so ive been paying all this money for FROZEN READY MEALS??

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: im actually fuming and laughing at the same time

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: whatever just get it to me already

replies.text: sure tell me how to get there
on my way which tower was it again

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: half spilled so what am i supposed to eat

replies.text: ill bring whats left can you tell me how to get there
want me to redo the whole order

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: DELIVERED?? im literally home and got NOTHING

replies.text: might be a system glitch let me check
are you sure you put in the right address?

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: hurry up and check then

replies.text: checked yeah its not delivered im heading over
ok honestly im actually still on the way

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: are you HAVING A LAUGH right now

replies.text: look do you still want it or not

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: what are you SAYING everyone else finds it just fine

replies.text: can you double check it though

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: how long were you stuck for

replies.text: almost ten minutes just got out
just two minutes on my way now

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: yeah the lifts in this building break down all the time right

replies.text: im inside your building now how do i get there

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: you SAID you were at my address but youre still on the way??

replies.text: oh i meant im in the lift

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: mega tower block B4 mezzanine 62 unit 191

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: did you even look at the address

replies.text: yeah yeah just double checking the block number
sorry the app only shows the building not the unit

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: get to floor 63 theres a maintenance hatch next to the synth-meat vendor go down from there

replies.text: floor 63 synth-meat vendor maintenance hatch got it
maintenance hatch? isnt that staff only

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: nothing in this building is proper its all dodgy routes like this

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: dont delivery drivers come here every day how do you not know this

replies.text: im new never been to this tower
hows the security here can anyone just walk in

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: why are you so bothered

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: below floor 4 anyone can get in above that you need a keycard

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: just follow someone into the lift nobody checks

replies.text: security is well dodgy here innit

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: fine fine fine just my luck

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: tell me where you are right now

replies.text: im at the mega tower entrance
which tower and floor are you on let me confirm

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: go into the lift lobby and head to floor 4

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: turn left on 4 keep walking when you see the fuse box take the stairwell on the right with all the posters

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: go up one floor

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: go straight youll see another lift bank take it to 63

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: on 63 theres a synth-meat vendor on the right

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: next to the vendor theres a small maintenance hatch go down to mezzanine 62

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: once youre on the mezzanine im unit 191 follow the numbers

replies.text: theres nothing here are you sure about this

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: what floor are you on

replies.text: no idea everything looks the same here

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: did you take the wrong lift

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: go back to 63 and come down through the maintenance hatch by the synth-meat guy

replies.text: too many lifts in this building which one

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: the one you get to from the 4th floor stairwell

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: dont tell me you havent even made it to FLOOR 4

replies.text: i did i did let me look around
can you drop us a pin

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: no signal down on the mezzanine location drifts all over

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: just follow my directions you cant miss it

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: where are you now

replies.text: are you sure its block B4
the unit numbers on this mezzanine make no sense

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: its right next to the synth-meat vendor you cant see it?

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: the grey one that says maintenance access

replies.text: this one says "no entry" can i go in

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: nobody cares about that sign just go in

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: you say that every time

replies.text: this building is an absolute maze its not my fault

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: B4 ive lived here three years you think i dont know

replies.text: how do you get between B4 and B5

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: theres a walkway on floor 4 cross over from B5 to B4

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: dont tell me youre in B5

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: some of these units were added later numbering is all messed up

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: what number are you at

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: go right 191 is further in

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: JUST YOU WAIT

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: im filing a complaint

replies.text: i havent got an employee number
take it up with the platform

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: YOURE DONE

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: im going to your manager

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: with that attitude youre getting SACKED sooner or later

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: platform says complaint is processing so just wait

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: are you always this useless

replies.text: nah today was just a bit mad

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: hmph

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: hi i submitted a repair request last friday when are you sending someone

replies.text: hello valued customer please provide your ticket number

nodes.speaker: YOU
nodes.message: ticket RQ-20890721-9521G status: completed

nodes.speaker: YOU
nodes.message: thank you for using our products

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: are you serious

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: transfer to a human

nodes.speaker: YOU
nodes.message: hello how can i help you

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: i submitted a repair ticket last week and nobody came

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: your system says its done

nodes.speaker: YOU
nodes.message: our records show someone was dispatched sir

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: nobody came

replies.text: could you resubmit a new ticket sir

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: youre joking right

replies.text: thank you for your support have a nice day
anything else i can help with

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: are you even listening to me

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: hello?

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: i cant do this anymore

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: how can someone even say that

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: they just dmd me saying my system got hacked

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: how is that even possible ive been building this system for 10 years

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: absolutely no one could break through it

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: exactly what do they even know to be criticising me

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: no i cant let this go

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: im gonna kick them from the group

replies.text: let it go besides youre not even an admin

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: watch me

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: done i nuked their server

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: easy as that

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: why so quiet

replies.text: just processing that you actually did it

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: hi is the pc you listed on the platform still for sale

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: i see you listed it at 600 can you go lower

replies.text: cant go lower thats the going rate

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: ive noticed the psu was swapped and the cooling was modded

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: warranty is definitely void

replies.text: so? brand new is 1500 and this is less than half

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: look ill be honest with you

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: im a student and i only have 400 to spare

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: can you just give me a deal

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: how do you know my age???

replies.text: your profile page on the platform

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: oh well you see uh

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: come on mate the machine is old

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: just sell it to me for 400

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: its not like anyone else is buying it

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: just tell me yes or no

nodes.speaker: TARGET
nodes.message: mate please 400 im begging you
